text: - 1.1 SAFETY PLAN: As further described Section 7 of the GS Construction Mountain, LLC Project Manual, Subcontractor must submit a written site-specific safety plan and Safety Data Sheets for all materials being used on job prior to starting work. A site-specific safety plan shall be delivered to GS Construction Mountain, LLC both electronically and in hard copy. The Contractor Project Specific Safety Program is located in the field office for Subcontractor's use and compliance.
